allow: Bash(powershell -NonInteractive -Command "& { $null = New-Item -Path C:/projects/myapp -ItemType Directory -Force; & scripts/setup-tools.ps1 -Tool gemini,vscode,cursor,opencode,kilo,codex,kiro -ProjectDir C:/projects/myapp }")
